mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shared_verification_codes (business_type, verification_key, code_value, target, expires_at, consumed) VALUES (#{businessType}, #{verificationKey}, #{codeValue}, #{target}, #{expiresAt}, #{consumed}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code_value = VALUES(code_value), target = VALUES(target), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at), consumed = VALUES(consumed), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shared_verification_codes WHERE consumed = 1 OR expires_at < NOW()
